reasoning: I have voted this way before, in 2016 and 2019, because the schemes come from Mamata's government. This year nothing has changed for me — my rice still comes on the Khadya Sathi card, my husband got his farming money in January, and the hospital card still works when we need it. The TMC workers here are people I know, they bring the forms and help us fill them out. The big man from the city who comes on TV speaking harsh words — he is from the BJP — but what has he done for my rice? I vote for what I can hold in my hand and what touches my family's belly, not for shouting.
primary_drivers: Schemes functioning (Khadya Sathi, Swasthya Sathi, Krishak Bandhu)
Familiar local TMC support system and continuity with past votes
Distrust of aggressive BJP rhetoric on television
